# size()

**Instance Method**

Returns the size in bytes of the file for the representation.

## Declaration

```swift
func size() -> Int64
```

## Return Value

The size  in bytes of the file for the representation.

## Discussion

You typically use this method to allocate a buffer of the right size for [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetRepresentation/getBytes(_:fromOffset:length:error:)].

## Getting Raw Data

- **getBytes(_:fromOffset:length:error:)**: Copies a specified range of bytes into a given buffer.
